2066: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
2067:   env: Env,
2068:   workspaceId: string,
2069:   deploymentId: string,
2070:   maxCycles = 8
2071: ): Promise<void> {
2072:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2073:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2074:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2075:       return false;
2076:     }
2077: 
2078:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
2079:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2080:         workspaceId,
2081:         deploymentId,
2082:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_reconcile_deferred',
2083:         payload: {
2084:           inline: true,
2085:           reason: 'provider_deployment_unknown',
2086:         },
2087:       });
2088:       return false;
2089:     }
2090: 
2091:     try {
2092:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
2093:       const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
2094:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
2095:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);
2096: 
2097:       if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
2098:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
2099:         return true;
2100:       }
2101: 
2102:       if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
2103:         if (!latest.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !latest.sourceBundleKey) {
2104:           return false;
2105:         }
2106:         const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? latest.deployedUrl ?? null;
2107:         if (!deployedUrl) {
2108:           return false;
2109:         }
2110:         const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2111:         const latestResult =
2112:           latest.result && typeof latest.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latest.result)
2113:             ? (latest.result as Record<string, unknown>)
2114:             : {};
2115:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
2116:         const requestProvenance =
2117:           requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
2118:             ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2119:             : {};
2120:         const latestArtifact =
2121:           latestResult.artifact && typeof latestResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.artifact)
2122:             ? (latestResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
2123:             : {};
2124:         const latestProvenance =
2125:           latestResult.provenance && typeof latestResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.provenance)
2126:             ? (latestResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2127:             : {};
2128:         const successResult = {
2129:           ...latestResult,
2130:           url: deployedUrl,
2131:           artifact: {
2132:             sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,
2133:             sourceSnapshotSha256: latest.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2134:             outputBundleSha256: typeof latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
2135:             outputDir: typeof latestArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? latestArtifact.outputDir : null,
2136:           },
2137:           provenance: {
2138:             ...latestProvenance,
2139:             workspaceId,
2140:             taskId:
2141:               typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string' ? requestProvenance.taskId : (latestProvenance.taskId ?? null),
2142:             operationId:
2143:               typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
2144:                 ? requestProvenance.operationId
2145:                 : (latestProvenance.operationId ?? null),
2146:             trigger:
2147:               typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2148:                 ? requestProvenance.trigger
2149:                 : typeof latestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
2150:                   ? latestProvenance.trigger
2151:                   : 'manual',
2152:           },
2153:           rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
2154:           reconciled: true,
2155:           fromInlineCancelRequested: true,
2156:         };
2157:         const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
2158:           .prepare(

2161:                  deployed_url = ?,

2229:           )
2230:           .bind(errorCode, errorMessage, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2231:           .run();
2232: 
2233:         if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {

2235:         }
2236:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2237:           workspaceId,

2244:           status: 'failed',
2245:           errorCode,
2246:           errorMessage,
2247:         });
2248:         return true;
2249:       }
2250:     } catch (reconcileError) {
2251:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(reconcileError);
2252:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
2253:         return false;
2254:       }
2255: 
2256:       const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2257:       const failedUpdate = await env.DB
2258:         .prepare(
2259:           `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2260:            SET status = 'failed',
2261:                error_code = ?,
2262:                error_message = ?,
2263:                finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2264:                updated_at = ?
2265:            WHERE id = ?
2266:              AND workspace_id = ?
2267:              AND status = 'running'
2268:              AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
2269:         )
2270:         .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2271:         .run();
2272: 
2273:       if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
2274:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2275:           workspaceId,
2276:           deploymentId,
2277:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
2278:           payload: { code: providerError.code, message: providerError.message, fromInlineCancelRequested: true },
2279:         });
2280:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2281:           deploymentId,

2285:         });

2293:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2294:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2295:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
2296:       return false;
2297:     }
2298: 
2299:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2300:       return false;
2301:     }
2302: 
2303:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
2304:       return false;
2305:     }
2306: 
2307:     const retryUpdate = await env.DB
2308:       .prepare(
2309:         `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2310:          SET status = 'queued',
2311:              started_at = NULL,
2312:              finished_at = NULL,
2313:              error_code = 'retry_scheduled',
2314:              error_message = ?,
2315:              updated_at = ?
2316:          WHERE id = ?
2317:            AND workspace_id = ?
2318:            AND status = 'running'
2319:            AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2320:       )
2321:       .bind(
2322:         'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
2323:         new Date().toISOString(),
2324:         deploymentId,
2325:         workspaceId
2326:       )
2327:       .run();
2328: 
2329:     if ((retryUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2330:       return false;
2331:     }
2332: 
2333:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2334:       workspaceId,
2335:       deploymentId,
2336:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2337:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
2338:     });
2339:     return true;
2340:   }
2341: 
2342:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
2343:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
2344:     try {
2345:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2346:     } catch (error) {
2347:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
2348:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {
2349:           await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
2350:           continue;
2351:         }
2352: 
2353:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
2354:         if (!reconciled) {
2355:           const timeoutAt = new Date().toISOString();
2356:           const timeoutUpdate = await env.DB
2357:             .prepare(
2358:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2359:                SET status = 'failed',

<content>1: import type { Env, WorkspaceDeploymentStatus } from '../types.js';
2: 
3: export type WorkspaceDeployProviderName = 'simulated' | 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
4: 
5: export interface WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck {
6:   code: string;
7:   ok: boolean;
8:   details?: string;
9: }
10: 
11: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateInput {
12:   workspaceId: string;
13:   deploymentId: string;
14:   outputDir: string;
15:   outputBundle: {
16:     bytes: Uint8Array;
17:     sha256: string;
18:   };
19: }
20: 
21: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateResult {
22:   providerDeploymentId: string;
23:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
24:   deployedUrl: string | null;
25: }
26: 
27: export interface WorkspaceDeployStatusResult {
28:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
29:   deployedUrl: string | null;
30:   errorCode?: string;
31:   errorMessage?: string;
32: }
33: 
34: export interface WorkspaceDeployProvider {
35:   readonly name: WorkspaceDeployProviderName;
36:   precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]>;
37:   createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult>;
38:   getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult>;
39:   cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }>;
40: }
41: 
42: class ProviderError extends Error {
43:   constructor(
44:     public readonly code:
45:       | 'provider_auth_failed'
46:       | 'provider_rate_limited'
47:       | 'provider_project_not_found'
48:       | 'provider_deploy_failed'
49:       | 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
50:       | 'provider_scope_missing',
51:     message: string
52:   ) {
53:     super(message);
54:     this.name = 'ProviderError';
55:   }
56: }
57: 
58: type ProviderFetch = typeof fetch;
59: 
60: let providerFetch: ProviderFetch = fetch;
61: 
62: export function setWorkspaceDeployProviderFetchForTests(fetchImpl: ProviderFetch | null): void {
63:   providerFetch = fetchImpl ?? fetch;
64: }
65: 
66: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
67:   if (value === undefined) {
68:     return fallback;
69:   }
70:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
71:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
72:     return true;
73:   }
74:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
75:     return false;
76:   }
77:   return fallback;
78: }
79: 
80: function requireEnv(
81:   value: string | undefined,
82:   key: string,
83:   code: 'provider_auth_failed' | 'provider_scope_missing' | 'provider_deploy_failed' = 'provider_auth_failed'
84: ): string {
85:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '') {
86:     throw new ProviderError(code, `Missing required provider env: ${key}`);
87:   }
88:   return value.trim();
89: }
90: 
91: function cloudflareErrorsMessage(input: unknown): string | null {
92:   if (!Array.isArray(input)) {
93:     return null;
94:   }
95:   const messages = input
96:     .map((item) => {
97:       if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') {
98:         return null;
99:       }
100:       const record = item as Record<string, unknown>;
101:       if (typeof record.message === 'string' && record.message.trim()) {
102:         return record.message.trim();
103:       }
104:       return null;
105:     })
106:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
107:   if (messages.length === 0) {
108:     return null;
109:   }
110:   return messages.join('; ');
111: }
112: 
113: function toBase64(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
114:   const alphabet = 'REDACTED/';
115:   let output = '';
116:   for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index += 3) {
117:     const a = bytes[index] ?? 0;
118:     const b = bytes[index + 1] ?? 0;
119:     const c = bytes[index + 2] ?? 0;
120:     const value = (a << 16) | (b << 8) | c;
121:     output += alphabet[(value >> 18) & 63] ?? '';
122:     output += alphabet[(value >> 12) & 63] ?? '';
123:     output += index + 1 < bytes.length ? alphabet[(value >> 6) & 63] ?? '' : '=';
124:     output += index + 2 < bytes.length ? alphabet[value & 63] ?? '' : '=';
125:   }
126:   return output;
127: }
128: 
129: function isValidRelativeOutputDir(value: string): boolean {
130:   if (!value || value === '.') {
131:     return false;
132:   }
133:   if (value.startsWith('/') || value.includes('..') || value.includes('\\')) {
134:     return false;
135:   }
136:   return value.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
137: }
138: 
139: function mapProviderState(input: string): WorkspaceDeploymentStatus {
140:   const normalized = input.trim().toLowerCase();
141:   if (normalized === 'queued' || normalized === 'pending') {
142:     return 'queued';
143:   }
144:   if (normalized === 'running' || normalized === 'in_progress' || normalized === 'processing') {
145:     return 'running';
146:   }
147:   if (normalized === 'succeeded' || normalized === 'success' || normalized === 'completed' || normalized === 'active') {
148:     return 'succeeded';
149:   }
150:   if (normalized === 'cancelled' || normalized === 'canceled') {
151:     return 'cancelled';
152:   }
153:   return 'failed';
154: }
155: 
156: function dnsSafeLabel(input: string): string {
157:   const lowered = input.trim().toLowerCase();
158:   const replaced = lowered.replace(/[^a-z0-9-]+/g, '-').replace(/-+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
159:   return replaced || 'deployment';
160: }
161: 
162: class SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
163:   readonly name = 'simulated' as const;
164: 
165:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {}
166: 
167:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
168:     return [{ code: 'provider_simulated', ok: true, details: 'simulated provider selected' }];
169:   }
170: 
171:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
172:     const deployBase = (this.env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_BASE_URL ?? 'https://deployments.nimbus.local').replace(/\/+$/, '');
173:     return {
174:       providerDeploymentId: input.deploymentId,
175:       status: 'succeeded',
176:       deployedUrl: `${deployBase}/${input.workspaceId}/${input.deploymentId}`,
177:     };
178:   }
179: 
180:   async getDeploymentStatus(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
181:     return { status: 'succeeded', deployedUrl: null };
182:   }
183: 
184:   async cancelDeployment(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
185:     return { accepted: true };
186:   }
187: }
188: 
189: class CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
190:   readonly name = 'cloudflare_workers_assets' as const;
191:   private readonly accountId: string;
192:   private readonly apiToken: string;
193:   private readonly previewDomain: string;
194:   private readonly projectName: string;
195: 
196:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {
